title: Health Informatics Master Program Mission and Vision
content:
Health Informatics Master Program Mission and Vision

MISSION

To be able to respond to the rising health needs of society;

* To present broad learning environments with the expert academic staff in the field, laboratory and research centers,

* To train specialists and scientists who are compatible with R&D groups, attached to ethical values, creative, universal, and able to lead to health and science policies.

VISION:

To be a prestigious and preferred pioneer educational and research institution in cooperation with national and international graduate-schools in the field.
